docket_entries.description: BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA ESCOBAR SERVICE HERRERA, EVELYN M AKA EVELYN ESCOBAR,EVELYN HERRERA ESCOBAR,MIRNA HERRERA AND EVELYN MORALES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-07-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-11-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-23-2003
